name: Overpass POI Amenities
description: POI amenity discovery layer based on Overpass queries against OpenStreetMap features.

metadata.label: Overpass POI Amenities
metadata.constraints: Query volume must respect Overpass instance limits and ODbL attribution obligations.
metadata.human_summary: POI-oriented layer for nearby amenities such as cafes, transit points, and public services.
search_examples: show nearby amenities in central Rome
disambiguation_notes: Use this for place discovery. Prefer traffic or weather layers for mobility and environmental conditions.
metadata.location_dependency: Strongly location-specific and dependent on selected query area.
integration_requirements: No API key required for public Overpass instances
